scripts.build:packages: pnpm --filter @trader-paperclip/contracts build && pnpm --filter @trader-paperclip/config build && pnpm --filter @trader-paperclip/foundation build
scripts.dev: pnpm build:packages && pnpm exec concurrently -c auto "pnpm dev:api" "pnpm dev:worker" "pnpm dev:scheduler" "pnpm dev:web"
scripts.typecheck: pnpm build:packages && pnpm --filter @trader-paperclip/api typecheck && pnpm --filter @trader-paperclip/worker typecheck && pnpm --filter @trader-paperclip/scheduler typecheck && pnpm --filter @trader-paperclip/web typecheck
scripts.test: pnpm build:packages && pnpm exec vitest run
scripts.build: pnpm build:packages && pnpm --filter @trader-paperclip/api build && pnpm --filter @trader-paperclip/worker build && pnpm --filter @trader-paperclip/scheduler build && pnpm --filter @trader-paperclip/web build
scripts.ci: pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm build && pnpm db:migrate
